languages.text: "Ты и твои ребята — хорошие бойцы. Вот только выбрали не ту сторону. Оставьте Себериана".
languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_TraitorZarkov
И получен Obj2_Cl_Merovians

languages.text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."
languages.original_text: "Ты и твои ребята — хорошие бойцы. Вот только выбрали не ту сторону. Оставьте Себериана".

traits.locale_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."
"You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."
"You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

languages.text: “你和你的士兵都是优秀的战士，只是站错了队。离开塞贝里安吧。”
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: “你和你的士兵都是优秀的战士，只是站错了队。离开塞贝里安吧。”

languages.text: « Vos soldats et vous êtes de bons combattants, mais vous avez choisi le mauvais camp. Quittez Seberian. »
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: « Vos soldats et vous êtes de bons combattants, mais vous avez choisi le mauvais camp. Quittez Seberian. »

languages.text: "Sen ve askerlerin iyi dövüşçülersiniz. Sadece yanlış tarafı seçtiniz. Seberian'ı bırakın."
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Sen ve askerlerin iyi dövüşçülersiniz. Sadece yanlış tarafı seçtiniz. Seberian'ı bırakın."

languages.text: «Usted y sus soldados son buenos guerreros; solo se ha equivocado de bando. Abandone a Seberian».
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: «Usted y sus soldados son buenos guerreros; solo se ha equivocado de bando. Abandone a Seberian».

languages.text: "Ihr und Eure Soldaten seid gute Kämpfer. Ihr habt Euch einfach für die falsche Seite entschieden. Verlasst Seberian."
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr und Eure Soldaten seid gute Kämpfer. Ihr habt Euch einfach für die falsche Seite entschieden. Verlasst Seberian."

languages.text: 「君と君の兵士たちは、立派な戦士だ。ただ、間違った側を選んだだけだ。シベリアを去れ。」
languages.original_text: "You and your soldiers are fine fighters. You simply picked the wrong side. Leave Seberian."

traits.locale_text: 「君と君の兵士たちは、立派な戦士だ。ただ、間違った側を選んだだけだ。シベリアを去れ。」
